title: Verify Trial Corner is mutually exclusive with onboarding experiments
description: Test that users seeing Trial Corner do not see any onboarding experiments
preconditions: User qualifies for Trial Corner (did not start consumption in first 5 mins)

steps.description: 1. User activates trial but does not consume content in first 5 minutes
3. Check if Trial Corner is visible
4. Check if any onboarding experiment is displayed

expected_result: Trial Corner widget is visible, no onboarding experiments are shown to user
